creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text: I tested the modified image with a Lenovo X220, which refuses to legacy boot anything GPT.  It wouldn't even boot the USB image unless I UEFI boot. I installed to an external drive with the auto ZFS option, but not luck legacy booting off that drive.  I'm thinking the booting issue with the X220 is a different issue, i.e., not related to setting the active flag in GPT PMBR.
